HERO.TITLE: Our Products
HERO.SUBTITLE: Innovative solutions for Healthcare and Enterprise Resource Planning

HMIS.TITLE: PremiumCare
HMIS.SUBTITLE: Hospital Management Information System
HMIS.DESCRIPTION: PremiumCare is developed to automate manual operations in healthcare organizations. The main objective is to digitize the records of patients so that they can be easily recovered. Our system provides comprehensive management of all hospital operations from patient admission to discharge.

PATIENT_MGMT.D: Comprehensive patient admission, registration, and EMR

CLINICAL.D: Manage clinics, emergency, and inpatient care efficiently

LAB.D: Integrated LIS and RIS with PACS support

DECISION.D: Management dashboards with analytics and KPIs

LIS.D: LDM is a fully automated Web-Based laboratory information management system that covers all functional areas of modern multi-specialty laboratory.
LIS.F1: Complete workflow automation from patient registration to final result reporting
LIS.F2: Developed on Oracle 12c and Microsoft user interface technology
LIS.F4: Real-time graphical tracking for historical lab values and trends
LIS.F5: Automated alerts for critical out-of-range values and clinical safety

RIS.D: Comprehensive radiology and imaging department operations management system.
RIS.F1: Patient appointment and exam scheduling management
RIS.F2: Image capture, storage, and retrieval (X-rays, CT scans, MRIs)
RIS.F3: DICOM Interface with full standard storage support

EMR.D: Comprehensive patient medical history and clinical data management.
EMR.F1: Complete patient history on a single screen view
EMR.F3: Prescription management with drug interaction alerts
EMR.F4: Vitals tracking with graphical views and alerts
EMR.F5: Lab values plotted over time as graphs

ORDER.D: Streamlined order management for medications, treatments, and diagnostic procedures.
ORDER.F1: Clinical decision support with alerts and warnings
ORDER.F3: Real-time order tracking and status updates
ORDER.F4: Integration with pharmacy, lab, and radiology systems

ERP.TITLE: PremiumERP
ERP.SUBTITLE: Enterprise Resource Planning
ERP.DESC: Comprehensive ERP solution designed to streamline all your business operations. From finance and HR to inventory and procurement, PremiumERP provides integrated modules that work seamlessly together to give you complete control over your enterprise.

MOBILE.TITLE: Mobile App for Patient Reservations
MOBILE.SUBTITLE: Building authentic relations between healthcare providers and patients
MOBILE.F1: Easy appointment booking from anywhere, anytime
MOBILE.F3: View appointment history and upcoming visits
MOBILE.F7: Building authentic relations between providers and patients

HERO.TITLE: About OPS
HERO.SUBTITLE: Pioneer software company dedicated to healthcare and IT innovation

WHO.TITLE: Who We Are
WHO.P1: OPS (Optimum For Premium Solutions) is one of the pioneers' software companies in Egypt, specializing in healthcare and enterprise solutions.
WHO.P2: OPS is an extension of EConnect Technology Company established in 2005 to operate in the field of IT Development & Innovation.
WHO.P3: Our team brings over 20 years of experience in software development and IT Solutions, making us a trusted partner for healthcare institutions across the region.
WHO.P4: We are specialized in Healthcare & ERP Solutions, providing comprehensive systems that streamline operations and improve patient care.

VISION.TITLE: Our Vision
VISION.TEXT: "Speed Information delivery with high reliable integrated applications"

CORE_VALUES.TITLE: Our Core Values
CORE_VALUES.TEXT: Customer loyalty, leadership behavior, honesty, motivational environment, respect diversity and balance...

CUSTOMER_LOYALTY.D: Building long-term relationships with our clients through exceptional service and support.

LEADERSHIP.D: Leading by example and fostering excellence in everything we do.

HONESTY.D: Maintaining transparency and integrity in all our business dealings.

MOTIVATIONAL.D: Creating an inspiring workplace that drives innovation and creativity.

DIVERSITY.D: Embracing different perspectives and cultures in our global operations.

BALANCE.D: Achieving harmony between quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction.

CONSULTATIONS.D: Provide technical consultations in all IT fields.

BUSINESS.D: Comprehensive IT solutions for business needs.
